title: Annual Tech Symposium 2024
description: Join us for a two-day technical extravaganza featuring guest lectures and workshops.
details: The event will feature prominent industry experts covering AI, embedded systems, and robotics. Registration closes on March 10th. Open to all engineering students across the state.

title: Guest Lecture on VLSI Design
description: An interactive session by Dr. Jane Doe from Intel.
details: Learn about the latest trends in very-large-scale integration (VLSI) and semiconductor manufacturing. Venue: Seminar Hall 1, Time: 2:00 PM - 4:00 PM.

title: Even Semester Registration
description: Deadline to register for Even Semester classes.
details: All students must complete their course registration via the student portal. Please reach out to your faculty advisor for final approvals. Late registrations will incur a fee of ₹500.

title: Call for Project Proposals
description: Submit final year project abstracts to your respective guides.
details: Final year students must submit a 2-page project proposal detailing their objective, methodology, and hardware/software requirements. Approval must be obtained by Feb 15th to proceed with the procurement of components.
